text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Add SSE streaming to engine and new Fastify routes","description":"Add Server-Sent Events streaming support:
1. Engine chat() method already has StreamCallbacks - wire these to SSE
2. Create SSE endpoint in ai-engine/src/index.ts Fastify plugin: POST /engine/chat/stream
3. Update ai-engine-bridge.ts to forward stream events
4. Add SSE route in agent-api/src/routes/engine.ts
5. Engine needs to support streaming for both recipe (instant) and LLM (progressive) paths
6. Event types should match existing SSE contract: status, output, progress, result, error, complete

Look at agent-api/src/routes/execute.ts and ekoa/hooks/useJobStream.ts for the existing SSE pattern.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-06T21:07:13.085Z"}
